gateRules.IF_ANY_VIOLATION_CONFIRMED: Simulation output MUST NOT use that source. Block and report.
gateRules.IF_ANY_UNVERIFIED_NEEDS_REPAIR: Simulation output MUST be tagged 'inputs_unverified'. Trust-root blocker remains.
gateRules.IF_ALL_PIT_SAFE_VERIFIED: Trust-root blocker may be lifted. P29-G Dry-run Expansion may proceed.
gateRules.IF_INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: Blocker maintained. Evidence instrumentation required first.

Quote.reason: Date format mismatch — gate may be ineffective for same-year future records

Regime.reason: ISO-ISO comparison correct. All calculations backward-looking.

Chip.reason: Same date format mismatch as Quote. Schema comment wrong.

requiredBeforePromotion: Quote PIT date format repair and verification
Chip PIT date format repair and schema comment correction
